headline: Progressive Web Apps (PWA)
description: PWAs are web applications that use modern APIs to deliver app-like experiences: installable (manifest.json), offline-capable (Service Workers), push notifications, and background sync. PWAs work across platforms from a single codebase.

citation.name: Progressive Web Apps: Architecture, Performance, and Best Practices (2025)
citation.author: multiple
